chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 469 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on CMA No. 2832/24 (Exp) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For order on CMA No. 2833/24 (Stay) 19.11.2025 Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for appellant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press this appeal, which is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
